about: I love bringing people together for relaxed games and scenic runs. Expect upbeat energy, friendly coaching, and a welcome for first-timers.
I run energetic beach volleyball sessions and group rides. I love finding new routes and introducing people to my favourite spots.
I teach gentle outdoor yoga and pilates with an emphasis on accessible movement and laughter — bring a mat and an open mind.
I coach with patience and encouragement — I focus on technique and steady improvement during nets and climbing sessions.
I organise family-friendly activities and relaxed swim meetups — I prioritise safety and a fun atmosphere for everyone.
I love weekend social games and meeting new people — you’ll find me cheering on everyone and staying friendly.
I’m an outdoor enthusiast who enjoys long rides and sunrise hikes — always up for route tips and snacks.
I enjoy pushing limits and improving my personal bests — competition motivates me but I still enjoy good company.
I’m new to group activities and here to learn — I ask questions and cheer others on.
I’m laid-back and enjoy casual sessions, relaxed company, and a good laugh after the game.
I like trying new community events and writing short, honest reviews to help others decide.
I attend events regularly and leave constructive feedback focused on organisation and fun.
